title: Figure 6 from: Samarakoon MC, Manawasinghe IS (2026) Additions to the Xylariomycetidae (Sordariomycetes) fungal flora from northern Thailand: four novel Amphisphaeria species. MycoKeys 132: 63-90. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.132.188390
author: Samarakoon, Milan C.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 6 Amphisphaeria hydei (MFLU 26-0123). a. Substrate; b. Ascomata in dead substrate (ascomata shown with white arrows); c, d. Vertical sections through ascomata; e. Vertical section through the ostiolar canal; f. Peridium; g. Paraphyses (in Congo red); h–k. Asci; l. Ascus in Melzer's reagent; m–w. Ascospores. Scale bars: 100 μm (c, d); 50 μm (e); 20 μm (h–k); 10 μm (f, l–w); 5 μm (g).
